brand.name: Oriax Agents
brand.slogan: AI teammate orchestration for modern teams

hero.headline: Launch workflows with AI agents that plan, execute, and report in one flow.
hero.subheadline: Oriax Agents helps teams automate repetitive multi-step work with reliable human-in-the-loop control.
hero.trustLine: Built for product, operations, support, and growth teams.

highlights.title: Fast setup
highlights.description: Deploy your first agent playbook in under one day.

highlights.title: Controlled autonomy
highlights.description: Each agent run stays observable with approvals where needed.

highlights.title: Reliable handoff
highlights.description: Agents hand outcomes and context back to your team in clear reports.

problemSolution.problemTitle: Teams lose momentum in repetitive coordination
problemSolution.problemText: Important work is delayed by copy-paste tasks, scattered context, and manual status updates across tools.
problemSolution.solutionText: Define outcomes once, let agents execute the steps, and keep people in control at decision checkpoints.

features.label: Playbook builder
features.description: Create reusable task flows with prompts, guardrails, and approval gates.

features.label: Multi-agent routing
features.description: Route each sub-task to the best specialist agent automatically.

features.label: Unified memory
features.description: Keep context synchronized so every run starts with relevant knowledge.

features.label: Progress stream
features.description: Track execution events in real time with concise summaries.

workflow.title: Define target outcome
workflow.description: Set objective, constraints, and quality bar for each run.

workflow.title: Launch orchestrated agents
workflow.description: Agents split work, execute in parallel, and resolve dependencies.

workflow.title: Review and ship
workflow.description: Approve outputs with full traceability and ship faster.

useCases.title: Product launch ops
useCases.summary: Coordinate briefs, channel assets, and checklists with less manual chase.
useCases.metric: Save up to 12 hours per launch cycle

useCases.title: Support automation
useCases.summary: Triages tickets, drafts responses, and escalates edge cases with context.
useCases.metric: Reduce first response time by 45 percent

useCases.title: Growth experiments
useCases.summary: Run experiment loops from idea intake to report generation.

faq.question: Is Oriax Agents replacing human teams?
faq.answer: No. It is built to remove repetitive execution so teams can focus on higher-value decisions.

faq.question: Can we approve steps before final output?
faq.answer: Yes. You can configure approval checkpoints at critical stages.

faq.question: When will early access be available?
faq.answer: Waitlist members receive phased access updates and onboarding invites first.

waitlist.title: Get early access
waitlist.description: Join the prelaunch list to receive invite waves, roadmap drops, and private demos.
waitlist.successMessage: Thanks. Your waitlist request has been received.
